title: Add limit to V3Expand to prevent large replication operation runaway

features.name: large replication with parameter causing memory explosion
features.description: Code should include a replication operation with a large parameter value (thousands) on a wide signal, combined with a ternary expression that can select between zero and the replicated result
features.snippet: module t #(parameter NV = 2500) (input a, input [127:0] w2, output [31:0] o); wire [NV-1:0] d = a ? NV'(0) : {NV{w2}}; assign o = d[31:0]; endmodule
